channel.title: flove making-of — tokens questions
channel.description: New tokens design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: How should flove handle design system tokens?
item.description:
• Centralized tokens — Shared CSS variables across all apps. Consistent, less individual expression. • Per-app tokens — Each app defines its own variables. Flexible, less consistent. • Hybrid — Core tokens shared, apps can extend/override. Balanced.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Hybrid
